items.summary: The Royals beat the Seattle Mariners, KC 5, SEA 0. Stephen Kolek led the night, working 9.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 2 strikeouts and 1 walk. Maikel Garcia supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.0 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Mariners Recap
